entries.text: This call may be recorded for quality and training purposes.
Thank you for calling Pivot Point Orthopedics.
I just need your first and last name to get started.
Hey there, that was a loud noise! Sounds like you've got something exciting going on. What can I help you with today?
Hey, it's James Wilson here. Listen, I need to reschedule our meeting. Could we move it to tomorrow afternoon?
I am going to end the call now. Goodbye.
